title: VITEEE 2026 Phase 3 Counselling

detail.title: VITEEE 2026 Phase 3 Counselling
detail.short_info: VITEEE 2026 Phase 3 Counselling is live for ranks 45,001 to 70,000. Choice filling & locking: 28-29 May 2026. Seat allotment on 31 May 2026. Check full schedule, fees, documents, and what to choose for better campus and branch.

content.text: VITEEE 2026 Phase 3 Counselling is currently ongoing for candidates with ranks between 45,001 and 70,000. Choice filling and locking for Phase 3 is scheduled from 28 May to 29 May 2026, with seat allotment expected on 31 May 2026. VITEEE Phase 3 Counselling is the third round of centralized counselling conducted by Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) for admission to B.Tech programs across its campuses — Vellore, Chennai, Amaravati, and Bhopal.
Action Point: Complete choice filling before 29 May 2026 to participate in Phase 3 seat allotment.

sections.heading: How to Participate in VITEEE 2026 Phase 3 Counselling (Step-by-Step)

items: Login using VITEEE Application Number and Password
Pay the counselling fee (if not paid earlier)
Fill and lock your campus + branch preferences
Download the filled choices for reference

sections.heading: Seat Allotment & Choice Filling Tips for Phase 3 (Rank 45k–70k)

content.text: Candidates in this rank range have good chances in:

items: Popular branches like Mechanical, Civil, Electronics & Instrumentation, etc.

content.text: Popular B.Tech branches: CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Biotechnology, etc.
